mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification (notification_id, user_id, is_read, read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{isRead}, #{readTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, notification_id, user_id, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM user_notification WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, notification_id, user_id, is_read, read_time, create_time FROM user_notification WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
